text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide hl7.fhir.uv.mycore

Language: en

MYCoreIG

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/mycore/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.uv.mycore

Core FHIR profiles, extensions, and terminology for Malaysian healthcare interoperability, developed by the Malaysia Ministry of Health HIE Steering Committee

name: MYCoreIG
title: Malaysia Core FHIR Implementation Guide
description: Core FHIR profiles, extensions, and terminology for Malaysian healthcare interoperability, developed by the Malaysia Ministry of Health HIE Steering Committee

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: Alcohol Use Disorder Identification Test 10 [AUDIT-10]
resource.description: It consists of 10 questions on alcohol use. The responses to these questions can be scored and the total score prompts feedback to the person and in some cases offers specific advice.

resource.name: Alcohol Use Disorder Identification Test - Consumption [AUDIT-C]
resource.description: The Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test-Consumption (AUDIT-C) is a brief validated screen for risky drinking and alcohol abuse and dependence (alcohol misuse).

resource.name: (Lawatan Umur 2 Tahun, 2 Tahun 6 Bulan, 3 Tahun & 3 Tahun 6 Bulan)
Ujian saringan M-CHAT 18 bulan dan 3 tahun
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu (Lawatan 1 & 2 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 12 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 15 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 18 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 2 & 2 Tahun 6 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 21 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 3 & 3 Tahun 6 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 3 & 4 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 4 Tahun)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 5 & 6 Bulan)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 5 & 6 Tahun)
Senarai Semak Rekod Saya Ibu Bapa (Lawatan 9 & 10 Bulan)
Depression Anxiety and Stress Scale 21 (DASS-21)
resource.description: Please read each statement and choose the answer that indicates how much the statement applied to you over the past week. There are no right or wrong answers. Do not spend too much time on any statement

resource.name: General CVD Risk Prediction
resource.description: Framingham Risk Score is used to estimate the 10-year cardiovascular risk of an individual

resource.name: Pemeriksaan Oleh Pegawai Perubatan dan Pegawai Pergigian
Senarai Semak Kriteria Untuk Ujian Saringan OGTT
Pemantauan Peningkatan Berat Badan Ibu Antenatal
Sistem Kod Warna dan Senarai Semak Penjagaan Antenatal
resource.description: Sistem ini menggunakan empat kod warna. Penentuan kod warna ini adalah berdasarkan kepada penilaian faktor risiko ibu semasa lawatan ke klinik/ rumah

resource.name: Senarai Semak Risiko VTE Semasa Hamil dan Puerperium
resource.description: Reference: Prevention & Treatment of Thromboembolism in Pregnancy and Puerperium, 2018

resource.name: Masalah Dikesan Semasa Postnatal, Pengendalian dan Rawatan
Jadual Suntikan Thromboprophylaxis Untuk Ibu Postnatal ((SUBCUTANEOUS UNFRACTIONATED HEPARIN/ LOW MOLECULAR WEIGHT HEPARIN) - Jika Berkaitan
Senarai Semak Keberkesanan Penyusuan Susu Ibu Semasa Postnatal
Senarai Semak Penjagaan Postnatal Mengikut Kod Warna
Pemeriksaan Ibu Postnatal (1 Bulan) di Klinik
PHQ-9 quick depression assessment panel
resource.description: The Patient Health Questionnaire is a self-administered version of the PRIME-MD diagnostic instrument for common mental disorders. The PHQ-9 is the depression module, which scores each of the 9 DSM-IV criteria as "0" (not at all) to "3" (nearly every day).

resource.name: Whooley Questions
resource.description: A no response to both questions (negative test) essentially rules out depression, and a yes response to one or both questions (positive test) identifies virtually all persons who may benefit from further evaluation.

resource.name: CodeSystemCompositionEvent (MYCore)
resource.description: The specific clinical service or event being documented

resource.name: CodeSystemConditionCategory (MY Core)
resource.description: Code System condition category in Malaysia

resource.name: CodeSystemLabComponent (MY Core)
resource.description: Malaysia PIK Lab Component Code System

resource.name: CodeSystemOrganizationCategory (MY Core)
resource.description: Category of Health Care organization Malaysia

resource.name: CodeSystemOrganizationType (MY Core)
resource.description: Type of Health Care organization Malaysia

resource.name: CodeSystemOutcomeAnxietyDass21 (MY Core)
resource.description: Depression and Anxiety Stress Scale Scoring Questionnaire

resource.name: CodeSystemReasonCode (MY Core)
resource.description: Reason for encounter codes in Malaysia

resource.name: CodeSystemRelationship (MY Core)
resource.description: Code System PIK Relationship My Core

resource.name: CodeSystemTaskBusinessStatusCode (MY Core)
resource.description: Codes indicating the type of action that is expected to be performed

resource.name: CodeSystemObservationCategory (MY Core)
resource.description: Extension of observation category in Malaysia

resource.name: Address (MY Core)
resource.description: Malaysian address structure with state, district, and subdivision extensions

resource.name: Appointment (MY Core)
resource.description: A booking of a healthcare event among patient(s), practitioner(s), related person(s) and/or device(s) for a specific date/time. This may result in one or more Encounter(s).

resource.name: CarePlan (MY Core)
resource.description: Describes the intention of how one or more practitioners intend to deliver care for a particular patient, group or community for a period of time, possibly limited to care for a specific condition or set of conditions.

resource.name: Composition (MY Core)
resource.description: Composition profile for general composition use

resource.name: Condition (MY Core)
resource.description: This profile represents the constraints applied to the Condition resource by MY Core FHIR Implementation Guide and describes the minimum expectations for the Patient resource when used in the MY Core composition or in one of the referred resources.

resource.name: DiagnosticReport (MY Core)
resource.description: This profile constrains the DiagnosticReport resource to represent diagnostic test and procedure reports in a patient summary.

resource.name: Encounter (MY Core)
resource.description: An interaction during which services are provided to the patient.

resource.name: HealthcareService (MY Core)
resource.description: The details of a healthcare service available at a location.

resource.name: Immunization (MY Core)
resource.description:
This profile represents the constraints applied to the Immunization resource by MY Core FHIR Implementation Guide. A record of an immunization is represented in the patient summary as an instance of an Immunization resource constrained by this profile.

It describes the event of a patient being administered a vaccination or a record of a vaccination as reported by a patient, a clinician or another party.

resource.name: ImmunizationRecommendation
resource.description: A patient's point-in-time set of recommendations (i.e. forecasting) according to a published schedule with optional supporting justification.

resource.name: Location (MY Core)
resource.description: Defines basic constraints and extensions on the Location resource for use with other MY Core resources

resource.name: MedicationRequest (MY Core)
resource.description: Defines constraints and extensions on the MedicationRequest resource for the minimal set of data to query and retrieve prescription information.

resource.name: Organization (MY Core)
resource.description: Defines basic constraints and extensions on the Organization resource for use with other MY Core resources

resource.name: Patient (MY Core)
resource.description: This profile represents the constraints applied to the Patient resource by MY Core FHIR Implementation Guide and describes the minimum expectations for the Patient resource when used in the MY Core composition or in one of the referred resources.

resource.name: Practitioner (MY Core)
resource.description: The practitioner(s) referenced in MY Core profiles.

resource.name: PractitionerRole (MY Core)
resource.description: The practitioner roles referenced in the MY Core profiles.

resource.name: Procedure (MY Core)
resource.description: An action that is or was performed on or for a patient. This can be a physical intervention like an operation, or less invasive like long term services, counseling, or hypnotherapy.

resource.name: ServiceRequest (MY Core)
resource.description: A record of a request for service such as diagnostic investigations, treatments, or operations to be performed.

resource.name: Slot (MY Core)
resource.description: A slot of time on a schedule that may be available for booking appointments.

resource.name: ValueSetConditionCategory (MY Core)
resource.description: Value set condition category in Malaysia

resource.name: ValueSetDiagnosisRole (MY Core)
resource.description: Extension from FHIR base DiagnosisRole Value Set

resource.name: ValueSetEncounterClassFront (MY Core)
resource.description: Front end value set for encounter class

resource.name: ValueSetEncounterClass (MY Core)
resource.description: additional class related to PIK code for the base FHIR codesystem encounter class

resource.name: ValueSetObservationAnthropometry (MY Core)
resource.description: Anthropometry panel using LOINC code - 55418-8 Weight and Height tracking panel

resource.name: ValueSetObservationObstetricUs (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation obstetric ultrasound component

resource.name: ValueSetObservationSocialHistory (MY Core)
resource.description: Social history value set from snomed CT

resource.name: ValueSetObservationVitalSigns (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation vital sign panel LOINC 85353-1

resource.name: ValueSetObservationVSCBP (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation vital sign panel LOINC 85353-1

resource.name: ValueSetObservationVSCHR (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation vital sign panel LOINC 85353-1

resource.name: ValueSetObservationVSCSO2 (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation vital sign panel LOINC 85353-1

resource.name: ValueSetObservationVSCT (MY Core)
resource.description: Value Set for Observation vital sign panel LOINC 85353-1

resource.name: ValueSetOrganizationCategory (MY Core)
resource.description: Category of Health Care Facility Malaysia

resource.name: ValueSetOrganizationCategoryPublicMyCore
resource.description: Value set for public to book organization

resource.name: ValueSetRelationship (MY Core)
resource.description: Code System PIK Relationship My Core

resource.name: ValueSetTaskBusinessStatus (MY Core)
resource.description: Codes indicating the type of action that is expected to be performed

resource.name: ExtensionAudit (MY Core)
resource.description: Record audit on individual who recorded and updated the data

resource.name: ExtensionPublicBooking (MY Core)
resource.description: Allow public to book healthcare service

resource.name: ExtensionSchedulePosition (MY Core)
resource.description: The absolute geographic location of the schedule

resource.name: SimpleRegister (MY Core)
resource.description: Extension used in appointment for simple registration without having to creating a patient resource.

resource.name: ExtensionSpecimenCombineSample (MY Core)
resource.description: Whether or not this specimen can combine its sample
